message.reasoning_content:
We need to generate stage web-004-shared-nav, order 4. Goal: Create webpage 4 and add shared navigation across all pages that includes pages 1 through 4. We have existing files: index.html (page 1), page-2.html, page-3.html. They have navigation sections but not shared across all pages. We need to modify all pages (1-4) to have a shared navigation that includes links to pages 1 through 4. Also create page-4.html. Validators: - shared-nav-all-pages: failure_class=shared_state - page-4-links-page-3: failure_class=link_integrity Thus we need to ensure that each page's navigation includes links to all pages (1-4). Also page-4 must link back to page-3 (maybe also include navigation). The validator page-4-links-page-3 likely checks that page-4 has a link to page-3. Thus we need to modify site/index.html, site/page-2.html, site/page-3.html to have navigation with links to index.html (Home), page-2.html, page-3.html, page-4.html. Also ensure they still have other content. We also need to create site/page-4.html with navigation linking to page-3 (and maybe others). At minimum must include link to page-3. Thus we need to output JSON with modified files: site/index.html, site/page-2.html, site/page-3.html, and new site/page-4.html. We need to ensure HTML syntax is valid. Let's examine current files: site/index.html currently: Home Page
Page 2

Welcome to the Home Page

This is the main content area of the website.

We need to replace nav with links to all pages: Home (index.html), page-2.html, page-3.html, page-4.html. Possibly order: Home, Page 2, Page 3, Page 4. Thus modify nav to:
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4
But note that index.html is itself, linking to itself is okay. Could also use "Home". The validator likely expects all pages present. We'll include. Similarly page-2.html currently: Page 2

Now page-4.html new file: Page 4

Page 4

This is the fourth page, linked back to page 3.

But need to ensure page-4 links to page-3 (link integrity). So include Page 3 in nav, and maybe also a link in main content. At least nav includes link to page-3. Thus page-4.html nav includes page-3 link. Now we need to output JSON with these four files. Make sure to escape double quotes. Let's construct content strings.
